title: zoysia matrella var. japonica
intro: Zoysia matrella var. japonica, also known as Japanese zoysia or Manjaku, is a type of grass native to Southeast Asia and Japan, and is used as a medicinal herb. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Zoysia matrella var. japonica include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional herbal preparations, Zoysia matrella var. japonica is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
